title: [Cloud] Flamingo - Pair headset with charge case
scenario: Voyager Legend 50 headset and charge case battery levels and Cloud website device details display correctly after power cycle with charge case
steps: 1. Launch Poly Studio Mobile app and log into your account.
2. Pair the Poly Voyager Legend 50 (Flamingo) headset with the app via Bluetooth.
3. Verify the headset is connected and displayed on the Home screen.
4. Turn the headset off by pressing and holding the Power button.
5. Place the headset into the charge case.
9. Turn the headset on by pressing and holding the Power button.
10. Observe the Poly Studio Mobile app Home screen for battery level indicators for both the headset and the charge case.
11. Log into the Poly Cloud website (cloud.poly.com) using the same account credentials.
12. Navigate to the Devices section on the Cloud website.
13. Locate the device entry for the paired headset.
14. Click on the device entry to open the device details page.
expected:
- Headset turns on successfully after opening the case and pressing the Power button.
- Poly Studio Mobile app displays battery levels for both the headset earpiece and the charge case on the Home screen.
- On the Poly Cloud website, the device is displayed as "Voyager Legend 50 UC".
- Clicking the device entry opens a details page showing:
- Earpiece and charge case information
- Device image
- Separate component entries for the earpiece and the charge case
